get.summary:
Generates a mashup image of two team logos, or a scoreboard image if provided gamecast permalink.
Example controller for grabbing two team logos and then displaying them in a mash-up using https://github.com/SixLabors/ImageSharp

parameters.name: gamecastPermalink
parameters.description: The permalink of the gamecast to generate a scoreboard image for

parameters.name: team1Permalink
parameters.description: The permalink of the team on the left side of the mash up

parameters.name: team2Permalink
parameters.description: The permalink of the team on the right side of the mash up

parameters.name: scoreboard
parameters.description: If true, generates a scoreboard image based on the gamecast permalink.  If false, generates a mashup based on team permalinks

get.summary:

get.summary:
Return user specific scores tab. For B/R 1.0 application.
Default is the Top Games tab (League = Other) if no league is provided or league is unrecognized.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma separated list of tag IDs

parameters.name: league
parameters.description: League enum (ex. NFL, MLB, NCAAF, NCAABB, NCAABBW, Soccer, etc.)

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: ID For a Team If provided

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Sub-Context (ex. for conference or tournament). List of possible context values is in response.

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: Users local timezone offset in seconds

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: platform (mobile or web). default is mobile

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: ID For a Team If provided

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Sub-Context (ex. for conference or tournament). List of possible context values is in response.

parameters.name: carouselContext
parameters.description: Carousel type (ex. home, widget, watch, etc.)

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: Users local timezone offset in seconds

post.summary:
Starts an event simulation.
https://statmilk.8bleacherreport.com/api/simulation/start
{
    "league": "nba",
    "game_id": 12345,
    "speed": 1,
    "leadup": 0,
    "tracks": false,
    "send_alerts": false,
    "season_id": 2024
}
post.description: Requires Okta authentication with simulation authorization policy.

post.summary:
Stops an event simulation.
https://statmilk.8bleacherreport.com/api/simulation/stop/999
post.description: Requires Okta authentication with simulation authorization policy.
